should_trigger.prompt: Share my verify-output compression telemetry with the maintainers
Generate an anonymized report from my compression jsonl I can paste into a GitHub issue
Help me file a compression telemetry report so contributors can see real-world ratios
Build a redacted summary of what compressed well and what did not on my Rails project

should_not_trigger.prompt: Why did my last rspec run produce so much output? Diagnose this single failure
Edit references/compression/rules.yml to relax the file_colon_line preserve pattern
Investigate why this verify command is slow
Show me the recent git commits on this branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: I have a few weeks of compression.jsonl on disk and want to send it back to the plugin team — can you help redact and format it?
After enabling RUBY_PLUGIN_COMPRESSION_TELEMETRY for a sprint, package up an issue-ready report that explains where compression worked and where it did not

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Run my rspec suite and explain the failures (no need to send anything anywhere)
Triage the failed CI run, then fix the migration bug it surfaced, then push the fix
